raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-E-003] interface.f90:9 <-> header.h:7  param[0] 'cfg'
  NON_INTEROPERABLE_TYPE: Fortran derived type 'mesh_config' lacks BIND(C)
  attribute. Layout is implementation-defined. Cannot compare with C struct.
  Fortran 2003 §15.3.5: non-BIND(C) derived types are not interoperable.

ERROR   [TC-E-003] interface.f90:3
  LOGICAL_IN_NON_BIND_TYPE: Field 'periodic' has LOGICAL type. In a
  non-BIND(C) type, LOGICAL has compiler-defined width and encoding.
  GFortran uses 4 bytes; may differ from C 'int' or '_Bool'.
